offer: For boutique hotel managers processing 5–15 bookings/month, unpredictable occupancy causes inefficient staff scheduling. We provide automated scheduling instead of manual scheduling based on historical data.
problem: inefficient staff scheduling due to unpredictable occupancy
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for boutique hotel managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about scheduling tools
DM 20-50 boutique hotel managers with a demo video
Share insights in community forums for hotel managers
try_it: Let users try occupancy forecasting tool and scheduling interface
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing manual scheduling
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant hotel management communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for staff
Allow CSV import for existing booking data
Enable one-click export of scheduling reports
